title: Implement Real-Time Segment UI rendering in details page
description: Stitch together the real-time transcript chunks in numerical index order, display timestamps for each segment, and auto-scroll the transcript window as new segments arrive.
acceptanceCriteria: Transcript segments are rendered in order of `chunk_index`.
Auto-scrolls the transcript container to the bottom when new segments are appended, unless the user manually scrolls up.

steps.description: Update details page to load existing chunks
steps.details: When loading `/meetings/[id]`, fetch any already-processed transcript chunks from the database and sort them by `chunk_index`.
Display formatted timestamps next to each chunk in the transcript pane.
Use a ref on the transcript container to scroll to the bottom when new segments arrive, preserving manual scrolling state.

technicalNotes: Prevent layout shifts by using absolute heights or smooth scroll behaviors.
